description: Bottom fragment of a legal document, in Arabic script. 6 lines preserved, contains witness clauses at the bottom. Some sequences can be read: l. 1 al-maʿānī allatī and l. 2 b. Isrāʾīl; at the end of the document, traces of signatures of the witnesses. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
